description: Add task status tracking and filtering to task list.

userStories.title: Add task status persistence with pending default
userStories.description: As a product team, I want each task to store a status value so that task state persists and existing records default to pending.
acceptanceCriteria: Add `status` column to tasks storage with allowed values `pending`, `in_progress`, and `done`
Backfill existing tasks to `pending` and enforce default `pending` for new tasks
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement backend status update operation
userStories.description: As a user, I want status changes saved from the task list so that task progress updates persist immediately.
acceptanceCriteria: Provide backend action or endpoint to update task status by task id
Reject unsupported status values and return validation errors for invalid input
Persist status updates and return updated task payload
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want each task card to show a status badge so that I can quickly scan progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards render status badge for pending, in_progress, and done states
Badge text and styling are distinct per status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control in task list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change task status directly from the task list so that updates are fast during triage.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list rows include a status selector with pending, in_progress, and done options
Changing selector value calls backend status update and refreshes row state
Failed updates show inline error feedback and revert optimistic state if used
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on pending, in-progress, or done work.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list includes status filter options All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Selected filter limits rendered task rows to matching status
Filter state persists while user remains on task list route
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
